examples: Another marvels at how fresh the play feels, given the shame and recklessness that still bedevil gay people.
Localized changes are easy to apply and you can see their immediate effect, but far-away side-effect breakages bedevil you.
According to Dr List: “The swarm manages to block and prevent the kind of groupthink that can bedevil good decision making.”
Rising food price inflation is expected to bedevil small groceries as well as the giant supermarkets.
The temptations of exercising discretion and marking solicited trades as unsolicited frequently bedevil stockbrokers.
